title: cylicodaphne hayatae
intro: Cylicodaphne hayatae, also known as Szechuan paperplant or Japanese paperbush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. It is native to Taiwan and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Cylicodaphne hayatae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
